mapper.insert:
SELECT nextval('seq_interface_log') AS ifid , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDD') AS reqdt , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'HH24MISS') AS reqtm
INSERT INTO INTERFACE_LOG ( IFID , IFNM , IFTYPE , REQDT , REQTM , STATUS , ISPROCESS , REQDATA , RESDATA , ERRMSG , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEURKEY ) VALUES ( #{ifid} , #{ifnm} , COALESCE(#{iftype}, 'R') , #{reqdt} , #{reqtm} , 'E' , 'N'
#{reqData}::TEXT
, null
#{resData}::TEXT
, null
#{errMsg}::TEXT
, null
, #{surkey} , #{surkey} )
mapper.select: /* LoggingMappe.xml - getSmsTargetList - sms전송대상 조회*/ SELECT ADCDDTKEY AS CP , ADCDDTNM AS URNM FROM TADMIN_MST_ADCD_DT WHERE ADCDHDKEY = 'SMS_TARGET' AND LAKEY = 'KOR' AND DELYN = 'N'

/* LoggingMappe.xml - getLogInfo - 인터페이스 조회*/ SELECT IL.IFID , IL.IFNM , REPLACE(DT.ADCDDTVALUE, 'date', TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI')) AS SMS_MSG FROM INTERFACE_LOG IL LEFT JOIN TADMIN_MST_ADCD_DT DT ON DT.ADCDHDKEY = 'SMS_API_TARGET' AND DT.ADCDDTKEY = IL.IFNM AND DT.DELYN = 'N' AND DT.LAKEY = 'KOR' WHERE IFID = #{ifid}
mapper.insert: /* adm-user-user-sql-oracle.xml - insertIfErpSmsMsg */ INSERT INTO TADMIN_EAI_SMS_BATCH ( SND_NR , SND_ROW_SEQ , SND_ROW_SEQ_CNT , SND_DATE , SND_TRNS_TYP , SND_PROC_STAT , SND_PROC_STAT_MSG , TRN_STATS , REG_ID , REG_DTM , WHS_COD , SMS_SND_ID , SMS_SND_TYP , SMS_REPLY_NO , SMS_MSG_TITLE , SMS_MSG , SMS_RECEIVER_INFO ) VALUES ( #{sndNr} , 1 , 1 , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDD') , 'I' , 'N' , null , 'SN' , COALESCE(#{urkey}, 'logInterceptor') , CURRENT_TIMESTAMP , COALESCE(#{ctkey}, '09') , 'WMSBS' || #{sndNr} , 'I' , '03180560365' , 'API 비정상처리 안내' , #{smsMsg} , #{urnm} || '^' || #{cp} )
